title: myosotis nemorosa subsp. lamottiana
intro: Myosotis nemorosa subsp. lamottiana, also known as Wood Forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Wood Forget-me-not include relieving pain and inflammation, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. Wood Forget-me-not can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
